2604.28169.title: PhyCo: Learning Controllable Physical Priors for Generative Motion
2604.28169.paper_summary: Modern video diffusion models excel at appearance synthesis but still struggle with physical consistency: objects drift, collisions lack realistic rebound, and material responses seldom match their underlying properties. We present PhyCo, a framework that introduces continuous, interpretable, and physically grounded control into video generation. Our approach integrates three key components: (i) a large-scale dataset of over 100K photorealistic simulation videos where friction, restitution, deformation, and force are systematically varied across diverse scenarios; (ii) physics-supervised fine-tuning of a pretrained diffusion model using a ControlNet conditioned on pixel-aligned physical property maps; and (iii) VLM-guided reward optimization, where a fine-tuned vision-language model evaluates generated videos with targeted physics queries and provides differentiable feedback. This combination enables a generative model to produce physically consistent and controllable outputs through variations in physical attributes-without any simulator or geometry reconstruction at inference. On the Physics-IQ benchmark, PhyCo significantly improves physical realism over strong baselines, and human studies confirm clearer and more faithful control over physical attributes. Our results demonstrate a scalable path toward physically consistent, controllable generative video models that generalize beyond synthetic training environments.
2604.28169.paper_summary_zh: 現代視頻擴散模型在外觀合成方面表現出色，但在物理一致性上仍然存在困難：物體漂移，碰撞缺乏現實的反彈，材料反應很少與其基本特性相匹配。我們提出了PhyCo，一個將連續、可解釋和物理基礎控制引入視頻生成的框架。我們的方法整合了三個關鍵組件：(i) 一個超過10萬個照片真實感模擬視頻的大型數據集，其中摩擦、恢復、變形和力量在不同場景中系統性變化；(ii) 使用基於像素對齊的物理性質圖的ControlNet對預訓練擴散模型進行物理監督的微調；以及(iii) VLM引導的獎勵優化，其中微調的視覺-語言模型以針對性的物理查詢評估生成的視頻並提供可微分的反饋。這種組合使生成模型能夠通過物理屬性的變化產生物理一致且可控的輸出，而無需在推斷時使用任何模擬器或幾何重建。在Physics-IQ基準上，PhyCo顯著提高了物理現實感，相較於強基線，人類研究確認了對物理屬更清晰和更忠實的控制。我們的結果展示了一條可擴展的路徑，朝著物理一致、可控的生成視頻模型邁進，這些模型能夠超越合成訓練環境進行泛化。
2604.28169.author: Sriram Narayanan et.al.
2604.28169.authors: Sriram Narayanan, Ziyu Jiang, Srinivasa Narasimhan, Manmohan Chandraker
